name: Chedder Cheese Casserole Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar in warm water in a large mixing bowl.
2. Sprinkle in yeast. Let stand 10 minutes, then stir well.
3. Stir in warm milk, butter and beaten egg.
4. Combine 2 cups flour, cheese and salt. Stir well to blend.
5. Add the flour, cheese mixture and beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 5 minutes.
6. Add remaining flour, beating well with a wooden spoon.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled (about 45 minutes).
8. Turn dough down and divide into two well-greased 1-quart casserole dishes.
9. Let rise again until doubled (about 30 minutes).
10. Bake at 375°F for 30-40 minutes. Remove from casseroles immediately and cool on wire racks. Makes 2 round loaves.
